generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera_VisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VedderESC_MotorSpeedFeedbackTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for vehicle steering feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera_VisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VedderESC_MotorSpeedFeedbackTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClustering
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera_VisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth and visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera_VisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterObjectTracking
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data derived from Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VedderESC_MotorSpeedFeedbackTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data from steering sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data from processed LiDAR and depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClustering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) control model for speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for real-time processing and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between physical and virtual twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote management via ROS2 middleware"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle steering"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system processing in cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteEnableAction, RemoteSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks and driving path for driver trust"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports of vehicle state for analysis"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC system processing for speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote speed adjustment via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking activation via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of desired speed commands, emergency braking signals, and ACC control outputs from Digital Twin Entity to physical twin's motor and steering actuators via ROS2 network, with data translation for protocol compatibility."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), User Entity (visualization and control), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi networks."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) for real-time monitoring and control; also used in design phase for experimentation and validation (as designed)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with data serialized and translated via Data Translation component."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed in cloud environment; Cross-System Entity (Data Translation) distributed across network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2 Reference Architecture) adapted for automotive use; compliance with 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V latency."
]
